news.paragraph: There are no recent headlines available for IWM. Traders should rely solely on technicals and options market dynamics for directional insights. The absence of fundamental news means any price action will be driven by broader market sentiment or technical levels.

examples.body: Small caps ($IWM) are outperforming Nasdaq ($QQQ) and S&P500 ($SPY). The primary reason is the fall in the oil, USD, and 10Y yields. Small cap is up 1.2% c…
